g.text: RING SLOTS RADIUS UNLOCK COST TOTAL CAPACITY
R1: ore buyer, furnace, repair, relay

svg.text: [W/S] switch ring -- [A/D] rotate slot -- [1-8] module type

g.text: station_module_t { type, slot (0-9), ring (0-2), scaffold, build_progress }
ring_slots[] = { 3, 6, 8 } ring_radius[] = { 68, 118, 168 } MODULE_RING_EXPANSION unlocks next ring
position derived: station.pos + v2_from_angle(slot * TWO_PI / ring_slots[ring]) * ring_radius[ring]
